cases.task: Create a bounded SENS evidence review meeting and dispatch two focused tasks.
cases.strategy: Use bounded evidence verification and synthesis before review.

jobs.title: Verify evidence anchors
jobs.instruction: Research and verify the latest SENS evidence anchors.

jobs.title: Synthesize verdict
jobs.instruction: Synthesize a bounded verdict from the evidence.

cases.task: Review a broad implementation request but narrow every task before dispatch.

jobs.title: Broad backend task
jobs.instruction: Implement a backend fix with bounded scope.
jobs.success_check: Only bounded files remain in scope.

cases.task: Discuss an under-specified task that has no actual file scope.
cases.strategy: Fail fast and request replan when no safe scope exists.

jobs.title: Unknown task
jobs.instruction: Decide what to do without any concrete file scope.

cases.task: Handle a repeated unresolved proposal safely.
cases.strategy: Stop at the round limit if the same unresolved proposal repeats.

jobs.title: Unresolved task
jobs.instruction: Decide what to do without any concrete file scope.
